name: Freezer Mix Romanoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen it up.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the frozen mix and water until boiling.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer, stirring frequently, for about 20 minutes or until the mix is thawed.
4. Prepare noodles Romanoff according to package instructions, omitting butter and milk.
5. Stir in sour cream-cheese sauce mixture and cooked noodles into the meat mixture.
6. Heat to boiling.
7. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
